svg.aria-label: Outcome prediction market example: seven bets stream from a question into the YES and NO pools; the YES price decays from ¢48 down to ¢40 in non-equal steps. The market resolves YES — 100 shares × 1 USDC each = 100 USDC payout; NO settles to 0.

g.text: Will BTC be above $80,000 at 06:00 UTC?
